title: Credentials lost after updating n8n container image
symptom: After updating the n8n container image, all stored credentials show 'Need first setup' and appear empty.
not_this_if: Using a persistent volume for storage
root_cause: The issue arises because the n8n deployment is using a non-persistent volume, which gets recreated on pod restarts. Without a specified encryption key, a new one is generated, leading to loss of previously stored credentials.
fix_steps: Specify a persistent volume for the n8n deployment to retain data across pod restarts.
Include the encryption key as an environment variable in the n8n deployment configuration.
agent_instruction: Ensure to use a persistent volume and set the encryption key in the environment variables.
